topic_summary: SYNTHETIC flat/linear engine — no branching, so every path is 3 questions and STEP N OF M is static (M=3). Proves the non-chained shape alongside the real aabca693 chained engine. Not a real product.

routing_logic: Linear: q1-entry → q2-detail → q3-decision → terminal. No branching between questions, so every path is exactly 3 steps (static M).
